Kopia/bekräftelse på e-signerat dokument. Signed by: BO EDVIN GUNNAR PETTERSSON Date: 2026-04-02 09:28:07 BankID refno: 019d4d17-5b47-759a-a759-d7f89ad0bad2 Signed by: JOHAN THUNBERG Date: 2026-04-10 01:05:07 BankID refno: 019d747d-d5d3-7a12-86f5-26c6082cd971
tldr: This document is a record of minutes from a meeting of the Election Committee in Stenungsund, held on March 31, 2026. It includes information about the attendees and confirms that the minutes have been approved.
lattlast:
The Election Committee is the group within the municipality of Stenungsund that is responsible for ensuring that all aspects of the election process are conducted correctly. At the meeting held on March 31, 2026, several politicians from various parties, including the Social Democrats and the Moderates, were in attendance.

The document indicates that the meeting was held at the "Skeppet" location within the municipal building. The meeting was chaired by Bo Pettersson and Maggie Robertsson. Individuals working with election-related matters, such as an election coordinator and an election administrator, were also present.

The minutes are the document that records what happened during the meeting. It has now been reviewed and approved by those responsible for ensuring its accuracy. This process is called "adjustment" of the minutes.

Information about the meeting has also been posted on the municipality's public notice board so that everyone can view it. This information will be displayed from April 10, 2026, to May 5, 2026.
